channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The crisis of AI’s hidden costs
item.description: The AI gold rush is creating an unexpected problem: massive waste in resource provisioning. Cloud cost overruns inevitably lead to a lack of true ROI for these systems. Many enterprises spend $2 to get $1 of benefits. That dog won’t hunt.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps
item.description: The report highlights the possibility of unauthorized access and control over critical systems. The post After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Don’t let this credit card fraud nightmare happen to you
item.description: Over 400,000 cases of credit card fraud were reported in 2024 to the Federal Trade Commission. The CyberGuy explains how to protect against becoming another victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New federal CIO onboard at OMB
item.description: Greg Barbaccia takes over for Clare Martorana as the government’s lead technology executive. The post New federal CIO onboard at OMB first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, ABC 4
